results.justification: EXACT TWIN — Topology-Aware Attention with persistent-homology biases injecting structural pattern into attention logits IS the multi-head PH feature aggregation in NGATU-DEFECT.

EXACT TWIN — Surgical Repair of Collapsed Attention Heads identifies per-head defect cells and applies surgical per-head repair projection — same artifact + same effect as the correction-projection P_repair on detected phase-defect cells.
xPerT processes multi-resolution persistence-homology features for downstream attention; covers PH-feature aggregation for transformer defect characterization.
PH dissects transformer embedding topology + flags unstable topologies as defects; identical operational paradigm to NGATU-DEFECT's PH multi-head feature aggregation for defect detection.

ComplexFormer's per-head complex-valued phase attention is the underlying RoPE-phase representation that NGATU-DEFECT's cocycle invariant operates on; both treat per-head phase as architectural primitive.
Persformer learns topological invariants on persistence diagrams as inputs to attention; same operational paradigm as cohomology-cocycle invariant computed on attention pattern.
PH analysis of attention maps for BERT compression — same effect: PH topology of attention used to identify and prune/repair head-level defects.
Walsh-Hadamard per-head structured output projection IS the same kind of fixed-orthogonal per-head correction projection that P_repair applies; identical artifact + effect.
